untranslatable_reason: Cup with Handle pattern requires visual/morphological analysis of price structure (cup depth, handle formation, left/right lip comparison, pattern height). These geometric characteristics cannot be expressed using only the allowed technical indicators (moving averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger Bands, MACD, etc.). Pattern detection requires candlestick sequence analysis and support/resistance level topology that is not available in the indicator set.
translation_notes: Signal describes a complex candlestick pattern requiring: (1) identification of cup formation with specific geometric properties (depth, width, symmetry), (2) handle formation on right side with length measurement, (3) comparison of left vs right cup lips. Provided a placeholder entry (breakout above upper Bollinger Band) and exit (breach of SMA-20) as proxies for typical cup-and-handle behavior, but this does not capture the pattern's specific characteristics. Parameters indicate 34% average rise in bull markets and 23% in bear markets. Consider implementing pattern recognition at the data preprocessing layer rather than as a rules-based indicator condition.
